# Syed Ahmer Shah — Software Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
# https://ahmershah.dev
# Format: LLMs.txt v1 (https://llmstxt.org)

> Syed Ahmer Shah is a software engineering student and full-stack developer from Hyderabad, Pakistan.
> He builds fast, secure, and SEO-ready web applications using Laravel, PHP, JavaScript, Bootstrap,
> and modern UI systems. He has 20+ professional certificates and 30+ published technical articles.

---

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://ahmershah.dev/
- About: https://ahmershah.dev/about/

- Testimonials: https://ahmershah.dev/testimonials/

- Terms of Service: https://ahmershah.dev/terms-of-service/

---

## About

Syed Ahmer Shah is pursuing a dual academic path:
- Bachelor's in Software Engineering — HITMS (Nov 2024 – Dec 2028)
- Advanced Diploma in Software Engineering (ADSE) — Aptech Pakistan (Aug 2025 – Sep 2028)

His focus is on building maintainable, scalable web software with clean backend architecture and
performance-conscious frontend code. He uses AI-assisted tooling (GitHub Copilot, Cursor AI,
ChatGPT, Claude) to streamline development workflows while maintaining strong software engineering fundamentals.

---

## Skills

### Frontend
HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), Bootstrap 5, Tailwind CSS, jQuery

### Backend
PHP, Laravel, WordPress, MySQL, RESTful APIs

### Tools & DevOps
Git, GitHub, VS Code, Vercel, Supabase, Firebase

### AI-Assisted
GitHub Copilot, Cursor AI, ChatGPT, Claude

### Other
SEO (technical & on-page), JSON-LD structured data, Web Accessibility, JSON, XML, Microsoft Office

---

## Services

1. **Frontend Web Development** — Responsive, accessible interfaces with HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript
2. **Backend Web Development** — Server-side logic, REST APIs, authentication, database design in PHP & Laravel
3. **Full-Stack Web Application Development** — End-to-end ownership from schema to deployment
4. **WordPress Website Development** — Theme customization, plugin config, performance & SEO optimization
5. **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)** — Technical SEO audits, structured data, Core Web Vitals, Search Console setup
6. **Content Writing & Copywriting** — Technical blogging, SEO articles, landing-page copy, editorial editing
7. **Graphic Design** — Logo design, social media banners, thumbnails, posters

---

## Projects

### Commerza — E-Commerce Platform
Full-stack e-commerce web application. Includes storefront, admin dashboard, product & order management, cart, authentication, and SEO optimization.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, PHP, Laravel, MySQL
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/commerza.git

### Novio — Online Tech Courses Platform
Frontend showcase with 30+ custom HTML pages simulating a premium online courses platform.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/novio.git
- Live: https://novio.ahmershah.dev/

### Auctions Table — Live Auction UI
Single-page auction platform with live bidding simulation, real-time animations, and fully responsive design.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/auctions-table-onepage-frontend.git
- Live: https://auctionstable.ahmershah.dev/

### Personal 3D Portfolio
Portfolio with real-time Three.js 3D background, Blender GLTF models, particle cursor, Turn.js certificate flipbook, and advanced SEO.
- Stack: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Three.js, Lenis.js
- Live: https://ahmershah.dev/

### WordPress Travel Website
Travel agency site with booking system, destination guides, and travel packages.
- Stack: WordPress, PHP, CSS, SEO
